treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 3.0 x 15 Onyx drug eluting stent deployed, post dilated with a 3.25 NC balloon at 16 ATM
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient was hemodynamically stable and chest pain free post procedure, noted to be borderline confused but with no focal neurological findings.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient experienced chest pain and was taken to the ED.
Patient received 4 baby aspirin in the ED.
Cardiac catheterization performed and stent placed.
Post procedure, patient was noted to be borderline confused but stable.

patient_outcome.final_status: Patient had a heart attack but was stable and chest pain free after the procedure.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Patient advised to take all medications and keep all follow-up appointments.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Patient is recommended to continue dual antiplatelet therapy for a minimum of one year post PCI.
